summary: RECLASSIFIED FROM FAIL_EXECUTION BACK TO PASS. Blocking finding BF-3C-001 (fn_record_dispatch_result 3 INSERTs using non-existent lcs_errors columns) RESOLVED by hotfix AR_20260224_LCS_ERRORS_COLUMN_HOTFIX. All 3 INSERTs now use correct columns (error_stage='dispatch_finalization', lowercase error_types, mid/sovereign_id, error_payload as jsonb). MID-not-found path uses mid=NULL + attempted_mid in payload (FK safe). Test file (test_transport_adapter_contract.py) aligned — _count_errors uses error_stage. CONSTITUTIONAL CHECKS: ALL 4 PASS — Cantonal (dispatch_event_log is SUPPORTING, not CANONICAL/ERROR; cantonal pair intact), Registry-First (CTB pre-registration before CREATE TABLE), Sovereign ID (no minting — operates on existing MIDs), No sideways calls (all within lcs schema). ENVELOPE: PASS. SCOPE: PASS. EXECUTION: PASS — all 6 acceptance criteria now met. AC1: fn_record_dispatch_result with FOR UPDATE lock, state validation, mid_ledger UPDATE. AC2: PASS — three error paths now log correctly to lcs_errors with constraint-compliant values. AC3: mid_ledger UPDATE with CASE-based timestamps. AC4: dispatch_event_log append-only with CTB SUPPORTING. AC5: lcs_transport role EXECUTE-only. AC6: 15 tests, all aligned. OBSERVATIONS: (1) SECURITY INVOKER gap consistent with prior phases — tracked, not blocking. (2) dispatch_event_log append-only enforcement confirmed.

resolved_findings.title: fn_record_dispatch_result — 3 lcs_errors INSERTs used non-existent columns
resolved_findings.resolution: Fixed by hotfix AR_20260224_LCS_ERRORS_COLUMN_HOTFIX. Column mapping applied: error_source→error_stage ('dispatch_finalization'), entity_id/entity_type→mid/sovereign_id, error_message/context→error_payload (jsonb). MID-not-found uses mid=NULL + attempted_mid in payload. All 3 INSERTs verified correct against DDL and CHECK constraints.

acceptance_criteria_status.AC1: PASS — fn_record_dispatch_result created with correct signature and FOR UPDATE lock
acceptance_criteria_status.AC2: PASS — three error paths now log correctly to lcs_errors with constraint-compliant values
acceptance_criteria_status.AC3: PASS — mid_ledger UPDATE with correct columns and CASE-based timestamp logic
acceptance_criteria_status.AC4: PASS — dispatch_event_log created with append-only enforcement, CTB SUPPORTING
acceptance_criteria_status.AC5: PASS — lcs_transport role with EXECUTE-only, comprehensive REVOKE ALL
acceptance_criteria_status.AC6: PASS — 15 tests across 3 categories, all structurally correct and aligned

reclassification_history.reason: Audit discovered fn_record_dispatch_result 3 INSERTs use non-existent lcs_errors columns. PL/pgSQL deferred validation masked the mismatch.
Blocking finding BF-3C-001 resolved by hotfix AR_20260224_LCS_ERRORS_COLUMN_HOTFIX. All 3 INSERTs verified correct. Function redeployed to Neon. Test file aligned.
